dataset_name.description: Hugging Face dataset identifier (e.g. 'ibm/duorc'); sent as the dataset query param on every request.

api_token.description: Optional Hugging Face user access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_token>). Public datasets do not need one; gated/private datasets do. Never logged.

access_token.description: Alternate access-token secret name legacy also accepts (checked after api_token); sent the same way. Never logged.

token.description: Alternate access-token secret name legacy also accepts (checked last, after api_token and access_token); sent the same way. Never logged.

base_url.description: Hugging Face dataset-viewer API base URL override for tests or proxies.
